title: Coleus diversus
intro:

Coleus forskohlii is a tropical plant native to Asia and Africa, known for its potential health benefits and bioactive constituents. The plant's roots contain forskolin, a bioactive compound with anti-inflammatory, cardiovascular, and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Coleus forskohlii include forskolin, which has been found to have a positive effect on weight loss, as well as other compounds such as isobutyrate, caffeic acid, and flavonoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Coleus forskohlii include capsules, tablets, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
taxonomy: Coleus diversus is a species of flowering plant within the Lamiaceae family. It is native to tropical regions of the world and is a member of the genus Coleus.
